hooks.command: BLOCKED=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('yes' if str(d.get('file_path','')).endswith('model.rs') else 'no')" 2>/dev/null); [ "$BLOCKED" = "yes" ] && { echo 'BLOCKED: model.rs is FROZEN per CLAUDE.md -- do not modify the Burn 0.20 architecture.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',d); print(ti.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null; cargo check --all 2>&1 | grep '^error' | head -20 ;; esac; true
